creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Share this with a book lover in your life! 📚💌 This is a bucket-list bookshop you have to visit in London, it’s the largest in the city and also the largest in EUROPE! 🗺️

This is @waterstones Piccadilly, with 5 floors, 8 miles of bookshelves and over 200,000 books in stock at any one time. It’s also one of Waterstones’ Games Flagships so it has every board game, card game and more that you could want.

Save this for the details:
📍 203-206 Piccadilly, London, W1J 9HD
🗓️ Open Mon-Sat 9am-9pm, Sun 12pm-6pm

transcription.text: Did you know that Europe's largest bookshop is in London with over 200,000 books in stock spanning across five floors? This is Waterstones Piccadilly. You can easily spend hours in here exploring the eight miles of bookshelves and here are some sections you should definitely check out. The kids section is on floor two and it is so cute. There's a giant elmer and a whole plushy section, a Paddington Bear postbox area and so many great details. There's also a whole games section and this is one of Waterstones games flagships so there truly is something for everyone here. On floor three there's also an entire tucked away art shop and here you can get all of your art supplies and right at the top there's also a restaurant and bar area. This is one you have to check out. Make sure you share it with a book lover in your life and find more details in the caption.
